parents.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_dynamic_nids into OBDF_DYNAMIC_NIDS

commit.subject: LU-18231 obd: change obd_read_only into OBDF_READ_ONLY
commit.message:
LU-18231 obd: change obd_read_only into OBDF_READ_ONLY

Change the use of the odb_read_only bitfield into a bit in
the ofd_flags bitmap and use atomic bit set/clear/test
operations on it.
No logical changes to the code and no changes to locking.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Build-Parameters: distro=el9.3 arch=x86_64
Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2a45e50a0d1ed25914e2a38eb717646dc027d905
